ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
No appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
(Clerical ERROR, Matter has been heard on Oct. 21, 2003 at 09:00 am. in Dept. 218)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Romy Barulich.
Appearance by petitioner Da-Thao Truong-Doan.

The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Tina Doan Truong
Decree signed in open court.
